name: Michael Faraday
title: Physicist & Chemist
bio: English scientist who contributed to the study of electromagnetism and electrochemistry. His discoveries include electromagnetic induction, diamagnetism, and electrolysis.
faith: A devout member of the Sandemanian church (a small Christian sect), Faraday's faith was central to his life. He served as a deacon and elder and saw no conflict between science and his Christian beliefs, viewing the study of nature as the study of God's creation.

sources.title: Glasite — Wikipedia
sources.note: About the Sandemanian/Glasite church Faraday belonged to

tagline: Discovered electromagnetism while serving as a church elder
